title: Independent review
summary: Review MUST evaluate the resulting workspace independently and MUST NOT silently repair implementation defects.
instructions: Review MUST verify acceptance criteria, test quality, maintainability, and scope control against evidence.
Each finding MUST include severity, evidence, and an owning remediation stage.
The review gate MUST fail when any hard blocker remains unresolved.
Before submission, review findings, acceptance-criterion coverage, verdict consistency, and the referenced review artifact MUST run their resolved policy-bound validators under VALID-001.
